name: ascendc-development
description: Version-aware Ascend C operator development, review, documentation, environment, CANN setup, and runtime debugging workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Develop, review, and debug version-matched Ascend C software.
interface.longDescription: Develop complete Ascend C operators, review Host, Tiling, Kernel, and support code, find version-matched API evidence, diagnose runtime failures from bounded evidence, inspect NPU environments read-only, and plan guarded CANN setup workflows.
defaultPrompt: Develop or migrate this Ascend C operator through a version-matched invocation path and layered validation.
Review this Ascend C change using target-version API, Host, Tiling, Kernel, and build evidence.
Diagnose this CANN runtime failure from bounded logs and the actual package, Tiling, launch, and stream path.
